description: Create modal dialogs that persist until a button on the dialog is pressed. Supported only in client scripts.

methods.name: alert
methods.description: Creates an alert dialog with an OK button.

params.name: options.title
params.description: The alert dialog title. Defaults to an empty string.

params.name: options.message
params.description: The content of the alert dialog. Defaults to an empty string.

methods.name: confirm
methods.description: Creates a confirmation dialog with OK and Cancel buttons.

params.name: options.title
params.description: The confirmation dialog title. Defaults to an empty string.

params.name: options.message
params.description: The content of the confirmation dialog. Defaults to an empty string.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates a dialog with the specified buttons. If no buttons are specified, an OK button is used.

params.name: options.buttons
params.description: Array of button objects with label and value properties. Defaults to a single OK button with value true.

params.name: options.title
params.description: The dialog title. Defaults to an empty string.

params.name: options.message
params.description: The content of the dialog. Defaults to an empty string.
